untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic position sizing proportional to deviation magnitude and incremental profit-taking at small thresholds. These features require multi-leg order management and continuous scaling logic that cannot be expressed as simple conditional rules. Lookback_period, threshold, and half_life parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT are essential for mean calculation and scaling algorithm but not provided.
translation_notes: Translated core mean-reversion concept using sma_20 as mean proxy. Entry when price deviates below (long) or above (short) the mean, exit when price reverts to mean. The proportional position sizing and incremental scale-out mechanics cannot be captured in static entry/exit conditions and require order management layer outside of rule engine scope.
